cvs_standard: All entities source-attributed. No pattern-inferred entities.

entities_detailed.name: PAS
entities_detailed.context: Negri polls: PAS in talks with Umno ... / PRN Negeri Sembilan: Pas akui berunding dengan BN / PAS buka ruang UMNO teraju Negeri Sembilan jika menang PRN
entities_detailed.note: Central to NS PRN: PAS in talks with Umno/BN for NS election cooperation; PAS offers UMNO to lead NS if they win

entities_detailed.name: UMNO
entities_detailed.context: PAS is in talks with Umno to form a political cooperation to face the Aug 1 Negri Sembilan polls / PAS buka ruang UMNO teraju Negeri Sembilan jika menang PRN
entities_detailed.note: PAS in talks with Umno for NS PRN; PAS offers UMNO to lead NS if they win

entities_detailed.name: Barisan Nasional (BN)
entities_detailed.context: Barisan Nasional's decisive victory in Johor will boost the coalition's morale and increase momentum in Negri Sembilan / Pas akui berunding dengan BN bagi menghadapi PRN Negeri Sembilan
entities_detailed.note: BN Johor victory as momentum for NS PRN; PAS negotiating with BN for NS election

entities_detailed.name: Perikatan Nasional (PN)
entities_detailed.context: Kekalahan dijangka, Pengerusi PN digesa letak jawatan
entities_detailed.note: PN chairman urged to resign after expected defeat; Johor PRN aftermath from kosmo 404 page article-link headline; not NS-specific
